title: March 2026 core update
text:
Released the March 2026 core update 
🔗 https://developers.google.com/search/updates/core-updates. The rollout may take up to 2 weeks to complete.

title: Google On Why Core Updates Take Weeks To Fully Roll Out
text: Google's John Mueller explained, one again, why it takes weeks to roll out a core update.  It is often because there are different components to core updates through the rollout stages, and each needs to be pushed individually....

title: My side project was annihilated by Google
text: If we assume a YMYL label, I can't guarantee this will fix your problems, but here are a few immediate steps you could take.- Byline your content and include biographical information. title: SEOmonitor Case Study Results
text: We just migrated our tracking stack. SEOmonitor is fantastic. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for accurate search volume. Love the forecasting tool.

title: Rankings dropped massively today
text: Anyone seeing huge volatility today on the Google search algorithm? Our SaaS product traffic plummeted overnight.

title: Google rolling out local pack changes?
text: The local pack format changed today, and SGE AI Overviews are pushing down all standard rich results. Anyone else tracking this?

title: March Core Update Finished
text: The rollout of the ranking update is now complete.
